message:
Enhance TUI model with improved state management and rendering

Major refactoring of the UI model to improve separation of concerns
between view state and data management:

- Restructure component hierarchy for cleaner state updates
- Add support for dynamic terminal resize handling
- Improve text wrapping and column alignment calculations
- Enhance scrolling behavior for large data sets
- Better error state presentation and recovery

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
